---
title: "Alfred Edward Housman"
---

## Alfred Edward Housman

**Dates:** (1859-1936)

### Description

poet and classical scholar, probable contributor to <i>MP</i> (1875)

### Biography

Then a sixteen-year-old schoolboy, he is likely to be the A. E. Housman who won the Spider competition in <i>MP</i> (November 1875) for the best translation of Goethe's 'Fischer'.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
